ClassroomConfig.title: ClassroomConfig
ClassroomConfig.description: Configuration and seating arrangement for the classroom

studentCount.description: Number of students in the class

blockedSeats.description: Array of 20 booleans representing X (blocked) seats

fixedSeats.description: Mapping from seat number (index) to student name for locked seats

assignedSeats.description: Array of 20 entries representing the currently assigned student names (or 'X' or null)

classroom_configs/{configId}.description: Collection storing the class config and seating charts
